_comment: GeForce NOW Game ID Database - Real UUIDs only!
_instructions: Add REAL game IDs found from the GFN web app (play.geforcenow.com). Open a game, copy the UUID from the browser URL.
_how_to_find: 1. Go to play.geforcenow.com  2. Find a game  3. Click it  4. Copy the game-id= UUID from the URL bar
